nasb.text: Then Abner and twenty men with him came to David at Hebron. And David made a feast for Abner and the men who were with him.

esv.text: When Abner came with twenty men to David at Hebron, David made a feast for Abner and the men who were with him.

cnv.text: 押尼珥帶著二十個人，來到希伯崙見大衛的時候，大衛就為押尼珥和與他同來的人擺設筵席。

ccb.text: 当时，他带了二十个人前往希伯仑见大卫，大卫就设宴款待他们。
